## Vault 2.0.0 

### Summary

Pending.

### New features

- SCIM identity provisioning lets Vault Enterprise provision identity entities
  and internal groups from external identity platforms through a beta SCIM 2.0
  interface.


### Bug fixes and security patches

- identity: Repair the integrity of duplicate and/or dangling entity aliases.
